metadata.name: Analyze Grid Impact of Building Electrification

description: A distribution planner needs to forecast the grid impact of a city's policy to ban natural gas in new construction, leading to all-electric homes.

nodes.task_description: Forecast the number of new all-electric homes that will be built in a specific neighborhood over the next 10 years.

expected_outcome.value: Planner generates a forecast of new connections.

nodes.task_description: Model the new electrical load from these homes, including heating in the winter and EV charging.

expected_outcome.value: Planner creates a detailed load profile for the new all-electric homes.

nodes.task_description: Add this new load to the existing feeder load forecast and run a power flow analysis.

expected_outcome.value: Analysis shows the new load will cause overloads on the local transformer and secondary conductors.

nodes.task_description: Develop a grid upgrade plan, including transformer and conductor replacements, to accommodate the new load.

expected_outcome.value: Planner creates a budget and timeline for the required grid upgrades.
